description_long: This object is a flat-panel computer monitor with a wide, rectangular display and a thin, black bezel framing the screen. The front view shows a vibrant display with a colorful scene, suggesting the monitor is powered on and functional. The bezel is uniform in thickness and has a matte black finish, giving it a modern and minimalistic appearance. The monitor is supported by a geometric, trapezoidal stand that appears sturdy and stable, with a flat base for placement on desks or tables. The side views reveal the monitor's slim profile, emphasizing its contemporary design. No physical buttons, ports, or brand logos are visible on any side of the monitor.
description: A slim, black flat-panel computer monitor with a wide display and a geometric stand, featuring a matte bezel and no visible controls or logos.
description_view_0: Front view showing the active display with a colorful scene, framed by a matte black bezel and supported by a geometric stand.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the monitor's slim profile and the angular design of the stand, with no visible controls or ports.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, flat back of the monitor and the stand's base, with no visible branding or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the thinness of the monitor and the absence of visible buttons or ports.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, matte black, and uniform in thickness, with sharp corners and no decorative elements or color contrast.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a geometric, trapezoidal pedestal with a flat base, made of matte black material, and shows no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
